nasb.text: You shall hang it on four pillars of acacia overlaid with gold, their hooks also being of gold, on four sockets of silver.

esv.text: And you shall hang it on four pillars of acacia overlaid with gold, with hooks of gold, on four bases of silver.

cnv.text: 你要把幔幕掛在四根包金的皂莢木柱子上，柱上有金鉤，柱腳安在四個銀插座上。

ccb.text: 要把这幅幔子挂在四根包金的皂荚木柱上，木柱上面有金钩，木柱立在四个带凹槽的银底座上面。
